title: Lethal Company Cave Sounds
description: Replaces the cave sounds with the insanity sounds and a few various other sounds from Lethal Company.
body:
This pack replaces the default cave sounds with some of the insanity noises and a few other various sounds from Lethal Company. Currently, there are 25 different sounds, I know there are more from the game that I could still add, so stay tuned for future updates.

Also thinking about going through and turning down the volume on some or all of these sounds, they're all kind of loud in game.
